problem.title: Insertion Sort
problem.description: Implement insertion sort algorithm to sort an array of integers in ascending order. Insertion sort is a simple sorting algorithm that builds the final sorted array one item at a time.

solutions.title: Solution 1 – Insertion Sort Implementation
solutions.description: Pick each element starting from index 1 as the 'key' and shift all larger elements in the already-sorted prefix one position to the right to open a slot for it. Repeat until the key is placed in its correct position, maintaining a growing sorted prefix at every step. The key insight is that the algorithm mimics the way a card player inserts a new card into a sorted hand, making it naturally adaptive and stable.

complexity.time: O(n²) worst and average case, O(n) best case
